title: ForgeRock OAuth 2.0 Token Response
description: An OAuth 2.0 token response from the ForgeRock Access Management token endpoint. Conforms to RFC 6749 and OpenID Connect Core specifications.

access_token.description: The access token issued by the authorization server

token_type.description: The type of token issued (typically Bearer)

expires_in.description: Lifetime of the access token in seconds

refresh_token.description: Refresh token that can be used to obtain new access tokens

scope.description: Space-delimited list of scopes granted to the access token

id_token.description: OpenID Connect ID token (JWT) when openid scope is requested
